description: We provide professional services and support to our customers.

services.name: Consultation
services.description: Free 15-minute consultation to discuss your needs

services.name: Business Package
services.description: Full solution for small and medium businesses

faq.question: How to order?
faq.answer: You can order through this bot by clicking 'Leave Request' or call us at +7 (999) 123-45-67

faq.question: What are the working hours?
faq.answer: We work Monday-Friday from 9:00 to 18:00, Saturday from 10:00 to 15:00. Sunday is closed.

faq.question: Is there a warranty?
faq.answer: Yes, we provide a 30-day warranty on all our services. If you are not satisfied, we will fix it for free.

faq.question: How long does it take?
faq.answer: Standard orders take 3-5 business days. Urgent orders can be completed within 24 hours for an additional fee.

faq.question: What payment methods do you accept?
faq.answer: We accept bank transfer, credit cards, and electronic wallets (SBP, ЮKassa).

faq.question: Can I get a refund?
faq.answer: Yes, full refund is available within 7 days if the service has not been started.

faq.question: Do you work with legal entities?
faq.answer: Yes, we work with both individuals and legal entities. All necessary documents are provided.

faq.question: Where are you located?
faq.answer: Our office is at Moscow, Example Street 1. You can visit us during working hours.
